nasb.text: Again He went out from the region of Tyre, and came through Sidon to the Sea of Galilee, within the region of Decapolis.

esv.text: Then he returned from the region of Tyre and went through Sidon to the Sea of Galilee, in the region of the Decapolis.

cnv.text: 耶穌從推羅境內出去，經過西頓，回到低加波利地區的加利利海。

ccb.text: 耶稣离开泰尔地区，经过西顿，来到低加坡里地区的加利利湖。

csbs.text: 耶稣离开提尔地区，经过西顿，从德卡波利斯境内又来到加利利湖边。
